creator: mmatalka@gmail.com
text:
I have purchased a Blue Yeti USB microphone.  It is a fancy USB microphone that podcasters use.  It also has a headphone jack so it does record and play.

When I plug it in, it is detected fine, and the device shows up on as a uaudio device and in /dev/sndstat as a pcm.  But it does not record anything.  Additionally when I try to play a YouTube video with it as my output, the video just stalls.  I am guessing this relates to the sound device not consuming the output?

I have tried with virtual_oss (which is my current setup) as well as turning it off and just modifying the default_unit, with no luck.

I have verified the microphone works on my phone as well as a Linux laptop.

Any ideas where to look?  What I can do to help debug?
